name: ArkAPI
description: Bitcoin-native pay-per-call APIs for agents and developers. Live deployment is on the Signet test network only.

funding.note: Current live deployment is Signet only.

tools.description: Full DNS records as structured JSON.
tools.sample_intent: Look up A, MX, TXT, NS, and SOA records for example.com.

tools.description: WHOIS registration data parsed into clean JSON.
tools.sample_intent: Fetch the WHOIS registration data for openai.com.

tools.description: TLS certificate analysis and expiry details.
tools.sample_intent: Check the TLS certificate and expiry for cloudflare.com.

tools.description: HTTP security header audit with score.
tools.sample_intent: Audit the security headers for https://www.ibm.com.

tools.description: Current weather and forecast by city.
tools.sample_intent: Get the current weather and forecast for Toronto.

tools.description: IP geolocation, ISP, and ASN lookup.
tools.sample_intent: Look up the geolocation and ASN for 8.8.8.8.

tools.description: SPF, DKIM, and DMARC posture with A-F grade.
tools.sample_intent: Check SPF, DKIM, and DMARC posture for proton.me.

tools.description: Check whether a domain allows DNS zone transfer and return exposed records when AXFR is enabled.
tools.sample_intent: Check whether example.com allows DNS zone transfer.

tools.description: Aggregate DNS, WHOIS, TLS, headers, email auth, parsed security.txt metadata, parsed robots.txt metadata, improved tech fingerprinting, HTTP redirect behavior, CT-log subdomains, provider detection, and resolved IP intelligence for a domain, with optional ai_summary.
tools.sample_intent: Give me a one-call domain intelligence summary for example.com, including security.txt contacts, robots.txt sitemap info, tech fingerprints, HTTP behavior, CT-log subdomains, and an AI summary.

tools.description: Aggregated Bitcoin headlines from free RSS feeds.
tools.sample_intent: Get the latest 5 Bitcoin headlines.

tools.description: Live Bitcoin spot price in 10 major fiat currencies, with optional currency filtering.
tools.sample_intent: Get the Bitcoin price in USD only.

tools.description: Anonymous AI chat with a 5-per-day token limit.
tools.sample_intent: Explain the difference between Ark and Lightning in simple terms.

tools.description: Higher-quality AI translation with optional style control for more natural output.
tools.sample_intent: Translate a French paragraph into natural English.

tools.description: Text translation with source-language auto-detection.
tools.sample_intent: Translate Bonjour to English.

tools.description: AI image generation with ArkAPI-hosted download URLs.
tools.sample_intent: Generate an image of a glowing bioluminescent forest.

tools.description: Full-page website screenshot with ArkAPI-hosted download URL.
tools.sample_intent: Take a screenshot of https://www.ibm.com.

tools.description: Generate QR code PNG from any text or URL.
tools.sample_intent: Make a QR code for https://arkapi.dev/fund/.

tools.description: Validate mainnet Bitcoin addresses and fetch live on-chain balance data.
tools.sample_intent: Validate a mainnet Bitcoin address and check its balance.

tools.description: Search the official NVD feed for CVEs by keyword.
tools.sample_intent: Search for WordPress information disclosure CVEs.

tools.description: Search open Polymarket prediction markets and return normalized results.
tools.sample_intent: Search open prediction markets for Iran.

tools.description: Look up a CVE in NVD with severity, CWE, KEV, and references.
tools.sample_intent: Look up details for CVE-2024-3400.

tools.description: Check domain availability via WHOIS lookup.
tools.sample_intent: Check whether an unregistered-looking domain is available.

tools.description: Extract the main readable content from a public URL as clean Markdown.
tools.sample_intent: Extract the main readable content from a news article as Markdown.
